Figure 2. Individual and aggregate successes for N = 50 series generated from the interactive model (8). The top panel shows the raster of individual successes, while the bottom panel reports the total number of successes at each time period. Parameters are ωi = 0.005, αi = 0.01, βi = 0.6, γi = 0.2, and pi,0 = 1/38 for all i.
